decks.name: Flags of the World
decks.description: All 197 national flags: every UN member and observer state, plus Kosovo and Taiwan, with notes on the lookalike pairs.

decks.name: The 50 States
decks.description: All 50 US states by shape and location on the map. Capitals and nicknames ride along on the back of every card.

decks.name: World Capitals
decks.description: Type the capital city of all 197 countries: every UN member and observer state, plus Kosovo and Taiwan. Covers multi-capital countries and recent renames like Astana and Gitega.
